---
title: ""
format: html
---
```{=html}
<div class="column-screen">
  <!-- Hero Section -->
  <section class="nonprofit-hero">
    <div class="hero-title">Data Resources for Non-Profits</div>
    <p class="nonprofit-intro">
      Welcome! This resource hub is designed to help non-profit organizations harness the power of data 
      to better understand their communities, measure impact, and make informed decisions. Whether you're 
      just starting with data analysis or looking to deepen your analytical capabilities, these modules 
      will guide you through practical, actionable approaches to working with data in the non-profit sector.
    </p>
  </section>
</div>

<div class="column-screen">
  <!-- Search and Filter -->
  <section class="search-filter-section">
    <div class="search-box">
      <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search modules by keyword...">
    </div>
    
    <div class="topic-filters">
      <button class="filter-btn active" data-topic="all">All Topics</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-topic="data-basics">Data Basics</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-topic="impact">Impact Measurement</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-topic="fundraising">Fundraising</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-topic="demographics">Demographics</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-topic="visualization">Visualization</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" data-topic="tools">Tools & Software</button>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<div class="column-screen">
  <!-- Start Here Section -->
  <section class="start-here-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2>Start Here</h2>
      <p>New to data analysis? Begin with these foundational modules.</p>
    </div>
    
    <div class="module-grid" id="startHereGrid">
      <div class="module-card start-here" data-topics="data-basics tools">
        <h3>Getting Started with Data</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Data Basics</span>
          <span class="module-tag">Tools</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Learn the fundamentals of data collection, organization, and storage. Perfect for organizations 
          taking their first steps into data-driven decision making.
        </p>
        <a href="modules/getting_started.qmd" class="module-link">Start Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="module-card start-here" data-topics="data-basics">
        <h3>Understanding Your Data</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Data Basics</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Discover how to ask the right questions of your data and interpret basic statistics to 
          understand trends and patterns in your programs.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">Start Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="module-card start-here" data-topics="visualization data-basics">
        <h3>Telling Stories with Data</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Visualization</span>
          <span class="module-tag">Data Basics</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Learn how to create compelling visualizations and narratives that communicate your 
          organization's impact to stakeholders and funders.
        </p>
        <a href="modules/stories.qmd" class="module-link">Start Module →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<div class="column-screen">
  <!-- All Modules Section -->
  <section class="all-modules-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <h2>All Modules</h2>
      <p>Explore my complete library of data resources.</p>
    </div>
    
    <div class="module-grid" id="allModulesGrid">
      <!-- Impact Measurement -->
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="impact">
        <h3>Measuring Program Impact</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Impact Measurement</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Develop frameworks for measuring and evaluating the effectiveness of your programs 
          using quantitative and qualitative data.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="impact data-basics">
        <h3>Creating Evaluation Surveys</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Impact Measurement</span>
          <span class="module-tag">Data Basics</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Design effective surveys that capture meaningful feedback from beneficiaries, 
          volunteers, and stakeholders.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Fundraising -->
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="fundraising">
        <h3>Donor Data Analysis</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Fundraising</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Analyze donor patterns, retention rates, and giving trends to optimize your 
          fundraising strategies and strengthen relationships.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="fundraising visualization">
        <h3>Grant Reporting Dashboards</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Fundraising</span>
          <span class="module-tag">Visualization</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Create compelling visual reports that demonstrate program outcomes and impact 
          to current and prospective funders.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Demographics -->
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="demographics">
        <h3>Community Needs Assessment</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Demographics</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Use census data and local statistics to understand the demographics and needs 
          of the communities you serve.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="demographics impact">
        <h3>Equity Analysis</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Demographics</span>
          <span class="module-tag">Impact Measurement</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Ensure your programs reach and serve all community members equitably by 
          analyzing participation and outcomes across demographic groups.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Visualization -->
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="visualization">
        <h3>Dashboard Design for Non-Profits</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Visualization</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Build interactive dashboards that help your team track key metrics and 
          make data-driven decisions in real-time.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Tools -->
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="tools">
        <h3>Free Tools for Non-Profit Data</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Tools & Software</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Discover free and low-cost software tools perfect for non-profit organizations, 
          including spreadsheets, databases, and visualization platforms.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="module-card" data-topics="tools data-basics">
        <h3>Data Security & Privacy</h3>
        <div>
          <span class="module-tag">Tools & Software</span>
          <span class="module-tag">Data Basics</span>
        </div>
        <p class="module-description">
          Protect sensitive beneficiary and donor information with best practices for 
          data security, privacy compliance, and ethical data use.
        </p>
        <a href="#" class="module-link">View Module →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="no-results" id="noResults">
      No modules found matching your search. Try different keywords or reset filters.
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<script>
// Search and Filter Functionality
const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
const allCards = document.querySelectorAll('.module-card');
const noResults = document.getElementById('noResults');

let currentFilter = 'all';
let currentSearch = '';

// Search functionality
searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
  currentSearch = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
  filterModules();
});

// Filter buttons
filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    // Update active state
    filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    
    // Update current filter
    currentFilter = btn.getAttribute('data-topic');
    filterModules();
  });
});

// Main filter function
function filterModules() {
  let visibleCount = 0;
  
  allCards.forEach(card => {
    const cardTopics = card.getAttribute('data-topics') || '';
    const cardText = card.textContent.toLowerCase();
    
    // Check topic filter
    const topicMatch = currentFilter === 'all' || cardTopics.includes(currentFilter);
    
    // Check search filter
    const searchMatch = currentSearch === '' || cardText.includes(currentSearch);
    
    // Show/hide card
    if (topicMatch && searchMatch) {
      card.style.display = 'block';
      visibleCount++;
    } else {
      card.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });
  
  // Show/hide no results message
  if (visibleCount === 0) {
    noResults.classList.add('show');
  } else {
    noResults.classList.remove('show');
  }
}
</script>
```
